text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Cognitive Inclusion Design end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: score-language
step.action: Run Flesch / Grade scorer; flag spans below target.
step.decision-gate: If score below target, STOP and rewrite or define jargon.

step.name: check-nav-consistency
step.action: Diff nav placement across screens; mark drift.

step.name: audit-error-flow
step.action: Trigger every validation; confirm inline, corrective, input-preserving.

step.name: audit-critical-actions
step.action: Verify each is undoable or has secondary confirm.
